instructions.instruction: Use this skill before modifying ANY deployment or release configuration.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill before modifying ANY deployment or release configuration.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for planning work that should trigger deployment-gotchas.

instructions.instruction: **Use `runtime.exs` for all secrets and URLs; never hardcode secrets — use `System.get_env!/1`** — see §1 & §5
instructions.original_snippets: **Use `runtime.exs` for all secrets and URLs; never hardcode secrets — use `System.get_env!/1`** — see §1 & §5

instructions.instruction: url: System.get_env("DATABASE_URL")  # Always nil in release!

instructions.instruction: Always use `System.get_env!/1` in `runtime.exs` so the app crashes on startup if a required secret is missing rather than silently misconfiguring.
instructions.original_snippets: Always use `System.get_env!/1` in `runtime.exs` so the app crashes on startup if a required secret is missing rather than silently misconfiguring.
